goals.title: Earn Azure Fundamentals (AZ-900) Certification
goals.description: Complete Microsoft Azure Fundamentals certification to establish cloud computing credentials and build foundation for cloud-native application development.

goals.title: Ship RiceAgent Pro v2
goals.description: Release the second major version of RiceAgent Pro with enhanced offline-first capabilities, improved Drift ORM schema, expanded reporting features, and integration with GST automation workflows built for the family business.

goals.title: Build Portfolio Website v2
goals.description: Design and deploy a comprehensive personal portfolio website showcasing all projects, experience, research work, and technical writing. Must reflect the cyberpunk aesthetic preference while remaining functionally clean and fast.

goals.title: Contribute to Open Source Projects
goals.description: Make meaningful contributions to 3+ established open-source projects in the AI/ML or Flutter ecosystem. Focus on substantive code contributions (bug fixes, features) not just documentation. Build public credibility as a builder.

goals.title: Land SDE Role at a Product Company
goals.description: Secure a Software Development Engineer position at a top-tier product company (target: companies with strong engineering culture like Google, Microsoft, Atlassian, Razorpay, Zerodha, or equivalent). Focus on systems-level roles that involve architecture decisions, not just feature implementation.

goals.title: Build AI Startup MVP
goals.description: Design and ship a minimum viable product for an AI-powered startup idea that bridges enterprise automation with accessible technology. Target domain: agricultural supply chain or rural infrastructure optimization. Validate with real users before scaling.

goals.title: Reach 1000+ GitHub Contributions
goals.description: Build a consistent, visible presence on GitHub with 1000+ contributions across personal projects, open-source contributions, and community codebases. Demonstrate sustained builder momentum, not just hackathon spikes.

goals.title: Become a Systems Architect at Scale
goals.description: Evolve into a senior systems architect capable of designing infrastructure that serves millions of users. Master distributed systems, microservices orchestration, and large-scale data pipeline design. Be the engineer trusted with foundational architecture decisions.

goals.title: Build a Product That Impacts 1M+ Users
goals.description: Create or lead the creation of a technology product — whether as a founder, co-founder, or technical lead — that reaches and meaningfully improves the lives of at least one million users. Impact measured by genuine utility, not vanity metrics.

goals.title: Bridge AI with Rural Development at Scale
goals.description: Build technology infrastructure that brings AI-powered solutions to rural communities — agricultural supply chain optimization, water/energy management, healthcare access, education delivery. Continue the Live-in-Labs ethos at a systemic level, creating platforms that make advanced technology accessible to communities currently excluded from the digital economy.
